text.title: Blameless Retro Template (Human Facilitation) Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pre-read
step.action: Facilitator reads + summarises into 1-page pre-read; distributes 24h before meeting.
step.decision-gate: If pre-read not distributed, BLOCK retro — participants need context.

step.name: timeline-review
step.action: 20-min walk through timeline. Apply language rule in real-time.

step.name: action-items
step.action: 15-min: top-3 actions, each with named owner + target date ≤ 90d + tracking ticket.

step.name: publish
step.action: Push to wiki / repo/postmortems within 48h of meeting.
